non_goals: No BACKTRADER modification before governance read
No new EBTA gate, status, threshold, or methodology

steps.title: Archivage controle des obsoletes
steps.objective: Identify and archive obsolete folders or files before the checkpoint, without deleting useful history or breaking active references.
entry_criteria: Active normative documents remain in Protocole/
Archive candidates are listed before any move

tasks.title: Inventory archive candidates
Classify each candidate as ACTIF, ARCHIVE_CANDIDATE, OBSOLETE_BUT_REFERENCED, or DELETE_NEVER
Search active references before moving anything
Archive approved runtime/protocol historical material in the appropriate archive area
Update references and runtime history if archival changes are made

exit_criteria: No active link points to a missing file

steps.title: Checkpoint du lot actuel
steps.objective: Confirm that the current EBTA runtime lot is coherent, tested, and ready to support the pilot pipeline work.

tasks.title: Audit current diff and classify intentional changes
Check Protocole to Implementation anti-divergence
Run runtime unit tests
Build minimal pilot research_package
Produce GO or LOCAL_FIX_REQUIRED checkpoint decision

exit_criteria: Minimal pilot package status is PASS

steps.title: Pipeline pilote EBTA reel local
steps.objective: Build a local pilot pipeline that produces a validated EBTA research_package from concrete inputs.

tasks.title: Combler les angles morts normatifs Phase A/B/C (audit exhaustivite Implementation vs Protocole)
deliverables: procedures/walk_forward.py + verification preventive OOS (C3 - DN-001 INV-001)

tasks.title: Define pilot inputs and output package shape
deliverables: schemas/config.schema.json durci pour les champs operationnels du paquet pilote
tests/test_minimal_pilot_pipeline.py verifie la coherence inputs -> package -> manifest

tasks.title: Connect procedure modules to generated artifacts
deliverables: build_research_package.py connecte sealing, oos_access, monitoring, incubation, lifecycle et reproduction validation aux artefacts generes
package_shape.json manifeste les rapports optionnels de gouvernance procedure
pilot_inputs.json expose les preuves locales necessaires aux rapports de gouvernance

tasks.title: Validate generated package with validate_package_dir
deliverables: test_minimal_pilot_pipeline verifie validate_package_dir directement sur le paquet genere
build_research_package.py genere un research_package status PASS

tasks.title: Add focused tests for pilot behavior
deliverables: test_minimal_pilot_pipeline couvre les rapports procedures manifestes
test_minimal_pilot_pipeline couvre le rejet d'une shape package vide
test_minimal_pilot_pipeline couvre l'echec en cas de drift des replications OOS preregistrees

exit_criteria: No normative contract from PAQUET D'EXECUTION EBTA.md is left without a corresponding Implementation/ artefact
Pilot package is generated from concrete inputs
Package validator returns PASS or explicit EBTA contract errors
No OOS selection, repair, or opportunistic tie-break is introduced

steps.title: Encodage runtime de strategie x actif
steps.objective: Encode the Protocole clarification that a selectable asset axis creates distinct strategie x actif candidates and must remain covered by WRC evidence.

tasks.title: Expose asset_universe and asset selection axis in search-space artifacts
Validate WRC matrix coverage for all applicable strategie x actif candidates
Convert the minimal pilot fixture to a multi-asset candidate family
Add rejection tests for missing asset-axis coverage
Update runtime traceability/history and relay state

exit_criteria: Search-space output shows asset_universe, asset_selection_axis, and asset_candidate_count when the asset axis is active
Candidate matrix and invariant checks reject omitted applicable candidates or undeclared candidate assets
Minimal pilot package validates with a multi-asset search family
Runtime tests and pilot smoke test pass

steps.title: Integration BACKTRADER apres gouvernance locale
steps.objective: Connect BACKTRADER to EBTA artifacts only after reading its local governance and preserving EBTA authority.

tasks.title: Read BACKTRADER governance entrypoints
Map BACKTRADER outputs to EBTA artifacts
Implement adapter integration with explicit contract errors

exit_criteria: BACKTRADER remains subordinate to EBTA runtime contracts
No BACKTRADER convention becomes EBTA norm
Integration is journaled in runtime history

validation_commands.last_result: PASS - 2026-06-29 - CRLF warnings only for generated research_package files

risk_register.risk: Archiving an active source could break the EBTA reading path.
risk_register.mitigation: Applications and completed hook/plan/json artifacts were archived only after reference updates; Notes remained active because SOPs cite it.

risk_register.risk: Pipeline pilot work could accidentally add normative EBTA rules.
risk_register.mitigation: STEP_2 reste local a Implementation/, lit des inputs pilotes, ne modifie pas Protocole/ et conserve validate_package_dir comme gate d'acceptation.

risk_register.risk: BACKTRADER integration could import external repo conventions into EBTA.
risk_register.mitigation: Read BACKTRADER governance first and keep EBTA runtime as the contract authority.

risk_register.risk: A multi-asset strategy search could omit losing assets from the WRC family.
risk_register.mitigation: INV-017, candidate_matrix asset coverage, and the multi-asset pilot rejection test fail packages with incomplete strategie x actif coverage.

latest_decision.decision: STEP_2B_STRATEGIE_ACTIF_RUNTIME complete: asset_universe and asset axis encoded in search space, candidate matrix, invariant evidence, schemas, pilot fixture, and tests.
